title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Berger Paints - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Berger Paints - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
